case_title: BARBARA GOODYEAR ET AL VS. K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC ET AL

REMARK:RETURN MAIL BY POST OFFICE OCT-06-2023 NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAIL TO DEFENDANT(K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC.(ENVOLOPE MARKED:RETURN TO SENDER NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED UNABLE TO FORWARD)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GOODYEAR, BARBARA ROSENFIELD, STEPHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,575.00, SEE ATTACHMENT ONE (MC-025). THE JUDGMENT IS AGAINST DEFENDANT K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC ONLY. PLAINTIFFS SHALL TAKE NOTHING AGAINST DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY GOODYEAR, BARBARA ROSENFIELD, STEPHEN K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-26-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-26-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ERIC GROVER. PLAINTIFF BARBARA GOODYEAR AND PLAINTIFF STEPHEN ROSENFIELD ARE PRESENT. DEFENDANT K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANDREW COFFEY (PROJECT MANAGER). DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY REMY WEILAND (CLAIMS ADJUSTER). DEFENDANT K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC WAIVES SERVICE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT K J WOODS CONSTRUCTION, INC'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
